# Brennan Holzer

> Personal site of Brennan Holzer — software generalist and maker. Writings about software engineering, cloud infrastructure, security, developer tooling, and the craft of building things.

## About
- [About](https://brennanholzer.com/about): Background, skills, and interests

## Posts
- [Posts](https://brennanholzer.com/posts): Writings about projects and things I find interesting

## Projects
- [Projects](https://brennanholzer.com/projects): Software, infrastructure, and hardware projects
